name: edu-algo-playground
description: EDU-ALGO — an interactive data-structures and algorithms learning hub in two floors: data structures (BST/AVL trees, binary heaps, hash tables) and graph algorithms (BFS, DFS, Dijkstra, A*). Hand-written deterministic engines build the structure or run the search step by step, animating every comparison, rotation, probe and settled node. Guided levels and free sandboxes. Zero dependencies, zero build.
